subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was laid before the sight of the Wronged One by Abd, who presented it in His presence, and the sweet fragrances of love were wafted therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت را در منظر مظلوم عبد حاضر لدی الوجه معروض داشت نفحات محبت از آن
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
